onboarding.welcomeBody: Answer a few questions and Piri will explain every place — every monument, mosque, ruin, restaurant — through the lens of who you are.

name.title: What should we call you?
name.subtitle: Optional — used to personalize how Piri talks to you.

profession.title: What do you do?
profession.subtitle: Piri tailors its explanations to your expertise. An architect hears about structure; a historian about context.

faithInterests.title: A bit more about you
faithInterests.subtitle: Both optional. Skip anything you'd rather not share.
faithInterests.faithNote: Helps Piri frame sacred and historic spaces — a mosque explained to a Muslim differs from one explained to an architect.

weatherBanner.rainy: It's raining — perfect day for cozy cafes and indoor spots.
weatherBanner.snowy: Snow outside — let's find you somewhere warm.
weatherBanner.sunnyHot: Beautiful day — explore terraces and outdoor spots.
weatherBanner.sunnyMild: Great weather for a walk — see what's open nearby.
weatherBanner.foggy: Mysterious day — great for hidden gems and quiet corners.

home.error: Couldn't reach the server. Check your connection.

profileNudge.title: Personalize Piri
profileNudge.body: Tell us who you are — same place explained differently to an architect, a Muslim, a historian.

discovery.title: Discovering {{cityName}}{{dots}}
discovery.body: Piri is mapping places using global data. This takes 1–2 minutes.

cityEmpty.title: No places yet in {{cityName}}
cityEmpty.body: Discovery may still be processing. Pull to refresh, or try exploring a different city.

aiBanner.title: Ask Piri anything
aiBanner.sub: Tell me what you feel like — I'll find the perfect spot.

ai.title: Ask Piri

headerSub.fallback: Tell me what you feel like

ai.noMatches: No matches this turn. Try a broader follow-up.
ai.errorNotConfigured: AI recommendations are not configured in the backend yet.

suggestions.cozyRainy: Cozy indoor places for a rainy day
suggestions.photoSpots: Best photo spots at any time of day
suggestions.architectureBuildings: Buildings worth seeing for the architecture
suggestions.localFood: Best local food — not tourist traps

explore.emptyText: No places match. Try a different search or filter.

empty.favoritesBody: Open a place and tap the heart icon to save it here.
empty.planBody: Open a place and tap "Add to plan" to build your itinerary.
empty.visitedBody: Places you open will appear here.

optimize.title: Optimize my day with Piri
optimize.sub: Best order, timings & travel tips for {{count}} places →
optimize.query: I'm planning to visit: {{placeNames}}. Suggest the best order to visit them today, with estimated time at each and any walking or transport tips between them.

permission.title: Camera access needed
permission.body: Point your camera at any place in the world and Piri will explain it — tailored to who you are.

settings.faithNote: Helps Piri tailor explanations of sacred and historic spaces.

cityPicker.title: Choose a city
cityPicker.searchPlaceholder: Search any city in the world...
cityPicker.noResultsSub: Try a different spelling or a nearby city name.
cityPicker.hintBody: Search a city and Piri will discover places there using global map data. First discovery takes 1-2 minutes.

detail.temporarilyClosed: This place is marked as temporarily closed right now.
detail.verifiedAllDay: Verified public access throughout the day.
detail.unclear: Opening time is unclear right now.

note.publicOutdoor: Public outdoor places are generally accessible, but weather and light still matter.
note.estimatedNotVerified: Estimated from venue type, not live verified hours.

weeklyNote.verifiedFromSource: Verified weekly hours from a linked source.
weeklyNote.estimatedNotVerified: Estimated weekly hours from venue type, not live verified data.
weeklyNote.verifiedChecked: Verified weekly hours. Last checked on {{date}}.

profile.culture: Estimated venue hours for cultural stops.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.body: The app hit an unexpected error. You can try again, or restart the app if it keeps happening.

adminGate.title: Admin access required
adminGate.body: Enter the ADMIN_API_TOKEN configured on the backend to use this screen.

placeImage.meta: We only show real place photos after the source is verified.

adminHours.errorSavingFallback: Something went wrong while saving hours.

validation.endAfterStart: {{label}}: end must be later than start.

hero.title: Hours Review
hero.body1: Save verified opening hours, source links, and temporary closures without editing seed data.
hero.body2: Google preview only prefills the form. Nothing becomes live until you inspect it and press Save Hours.

adminHours.searchPlaceholder: Search by place name or id…
adminHours.formatHint: Use `HH:MM-HH:MM` and separate multiple windows with commas. Leave blank for closed.
adminHours.googlePreviewBody: Pull a candidate from Google Places, inspect the match, then save only if it looks right.
adminHours.noWeekdayDescriptions: Google did not return structured weekday descriptions for this match.
adminHours.noGoogleCandidates: No Google candidates were found for this place yet.

info.noPreviewsFound: No Google preview candidates found for {{name}}.
info.filledFromPreview: Filled {{name}} with Google preview data. Review it, then save.

adminImages.errorFallback: Something went wrong while loading image candidates.

hero.title: Image Review
hero.body: Review pending Wikimedia candidates, then approve and apply real photos to places.

coverage.title: Coverage
coverage.strongPending: Strong pending candidates in this filter: {{count}}

searchCandidates.title: Search Candidates
searchCandidates.placeholder: Filter by place name, id, or photo title…
searchCandidates.showing: Showing {{shown}} of {{total}} candidates in this filter.

adminImages.noCandidates: No candidates in this filter yet.

hooks.loadError: Something went wrong while loading data.
